title: Pediatric allergic rhinitis
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Lists sneezing, itching, rhinorrhoea, postnasal drip, congestion, smell change, eye symptoms, timing, and allergen or occupational triggers.
presenting_history.rationale: Supports child sneezing, itch, rhinorrhoea, congestion, eye symptoms and triggers for child allergic rhinitis; no decision is generated.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Lists sneezing, itching, rhinorrhoea, postnasal drip, congestion, smell change, eye symptoms, timing, and allergen or occupational triggers.

red_flags.text: Lists unilateral symptoms, visual change, epistaxis, fever, facial pain, purulent or bloody discharge, and systemic concerns.
red_flags.rationale: Supports unilateral, visual, bleeding, fever, pain and discharge warnings for child allergic rhinitis; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists unilateral symptoms, visual change, epistaxis, fever, facial pain, purulent or bloody discharge, and systemic concerns.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, duration, seasonality, triggers, nasal and eye symptoms, sleep, asthma, examination, testing, diagnosis and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for child allergic rhinitis.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
